series_metadata.series_description: This record series contains Local Technical Assistance Program training sign-in sheets, participation records and an electronic version of these records for all training provided by the OHIO LTAP Center. Also covered in this series is information concerning the OHIO LTAP Centers attendance/participation in trade shows.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: scanned, paper scanned images have been checked quality and completeness. ; Electronic: scanned images seven years
